name: Skillet Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:10
Combine cornmeal, baking powder, soda, and salt in a large bowl. Add eggs, buttermilk, and oil, stirring just until the dry ingredients are moistened. Place a well-greased 10-inch cast-iron skillet in a preheated oven at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 4 minutes or until hot. Remove from oven; spoon batter into skillet. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes or until lightly browned. Yield: 8 servings.
